Table DCS_PRODUCT

Card of table DCS_PRODUCT

Name

DCS_PRODUCT

Code

DCS_PRODUCT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_PRODUCT

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_CONSUMERORDER" schema

called "DCS_PRODUCT".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_PRODUCT_KEY based on (PRODUCT_ID, CATEGORY, PRICE, THUMBNAIL, DETAILED_IMAGE, MARKET_CODE)

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. The data in the target object must stay deduplicated.

 

7. Verify whether the newcoming ingested records in the source already exist in the Presentation Layer with any previous load, based on the

Unique Record Identifier.

i. If Yes, don't propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

ii. If No, propagate them to the Presentation Layer.

 

 

8. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

9. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD2

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_PRODUCT

CKT_DCS_PRODUCT


Server validation rule of the table DCS_PRODUCT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_PRODUCT

drop table DCS_PRODUCT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_PRODUCT
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT (
DCS_PRODUCT_KEY TEXT not null,
PRODUCT_ID INTEGER not null,
PRODUCT_CODE TEXT not null,
LANGUAGE TEXT,
CATEGORY TEXT,
LIST_PRICE TEXT,
PRICE TEXT,
WEIGHT TEXT,
QUANTITY INTEGER,
MIN_QUANTITY INTEGER,
SHIPPING_FREIGHT TEXT,
DATE_ADDED DATE,
DOWNLOADABLE TEXT,
FILES TEXT,
SHIP_DOWNLOADABLE TEXT,
INVENTORY_TRACKING TEXT,
FREE_SHIPPING TEXT,
FEATURE_COMPARISON TEXT,
ZERO_PRICE_ACTION TEXT,
THUMBNAIL INTEGER,
DETAILED_IMAGE INTEGER,
IMAGEPATH TEXT,
PRODUCT_NAME TEXT,
DESCRIPTION TEXT,
META_KEYWORDS TEXT,
META_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
SEARCH_WORDS TEXT,
PAGE_TITLE TEXT,
TAXES TEXT,
FEATURES TEXT,
OPTIONS TEXT,
SECONDARY_CATEGORIES TEXT,
SEO_NAME TEXT,
SHORT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
LOCALIZATIONS TEXT,
STATUS TEXT,
STORE TEXT,
VARCHAR TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_PRODUCT primary key (DCS_PRODUCT_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT.DCS_PRODUCT_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID is
'DCS product unique identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_CODE is
'Code of product. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT.LANGUAGE is
'Customer  language';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT.STATUS is
'Order status code identifier (values vary per market):';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT.STORE is
'Submarket/company identifier ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT.VARCHAR is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

Name

Code

DCS

DCS

Name

Code
